description: HR Tech Privacy is a privacy center describing how Indeed and Glassdoor/Fishbowl handle personal data, cookies, and related privacy rights. It provides policy and transparency information rather than developer APIs, CLIs, GraphQL endpoints, or MCP servers on hrtechprivacy.com.
summary: hrtechprivacy.com appears to be a privacy-policy and data-rights information site for Indeed/Glassdoor brands, with no public developer integration surfaces documented on this domain.
